general_crisis_line.name: General Support & Listening Warmline
general_crisis_line.description: Professional, confidential warmline for supportive listening, stress, loneliness, and life challenges. Non-emergency assistance.

accredited_buddies.name: Sarah Jenkins
accredited_buddies.bio: Certified in active listening. Here to provide a supportive ear for daily stress and anxiety.

accredited_buddies.name: Marcus Chen
accredited_buddies.bio: Vetted peer buddy focusing on mindfulness, stress reduction, and academic-work balance.

accredited_buddies.name: Elena Rodriguez
accredited_buddies.bio: Certified support buddy with experience in compassionate listening and family dynamic stressors.
